description_long: This is a square, flat pizza box featuring the Grandiosa brand, with a large, appetizing image of a cheese and pepperoni pizza on the front. The box is primarily yellow with red and white accents, and includes branding elements such as the Stabburet and Jarlsberg logos. The front of the box displays the word 'Pizza' in a bold, stylized font, along with the product name 'GRANDIOSA' and additional Norwegian text. The back of the box contains detailed product information, promotional text, and nutritional details, all printed in Norwegian. The sides of the box are solid yellow with some branding and product information, and the box appears to be made of cardboard, typical for frozen pizza packaging. The overall appearance is clean, commercial, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban convenience setting.
description: A square yellow Grandiosa pizza box with a large image of a cheese and pepperoni pizza and prominent branding, including product and promotional information on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Grandiosa pizza box with a large pizza image, bold branding, and logos.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the box's thickness and yellow side panel with partial branding visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying detailed product information, promotional text, and nutritional details in Norwegian.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the box's thickness and the continuation of the yellow side panel.
